mapper.select: SELECT play_date AS playDate, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(is_win) AS winCount, SUM(!is_win) AS loseCount, ROUND(AVG(is_win) * 100, 1) AS winRate, ROUND(AVG(try_count), 1) AS avgTryCount FROM game_result GROUP BY play_date ORDER BY play_date DESC

SELECT gr.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.email AS email, u.login_type AS loginType, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(gr.is_win) AS winCount, ROUND(AVG(gr.is_win) * 100, 1) AS winRate, ROUND(AVG(gr.try_count), 1) AS avgTryCount FROM game_result gr INNER JOIN users u ON gr.user_id = u.id GROUP BY gr.user_id ORDER BY winRate DESC, totalCount DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(is_win) AS winCount, SUM(!is_win) AS loseCount, ROUND(AVG(is_win) * 100, 1) AS winRate, ROUND(AVG(try_count), 1) AS avgTryCount FROM game_result
